uh, last few months.

of, uh, inspections for vintage, uh, cars.

That's one that's under development,
heavy vehicle driver licensing, um,
the digital driver's license.

minimum overtaking gaps.

source_metadata.description:
16 October 2025 | Transport and Infrastructure Committee
Petition of New Zealand Equestrian Advocacy Network: Vulnerable road user status for New Zealand horse riders
Ministry of Transport
	Paul O’Connell, Deputy Chief Executive, Sector Strategy
	Joanna Heard, Manager, Safety
	Amber Fraser-Mackenzie, Adviser, Safety
New Zealand Transport Agency
	Anna Cleary, Acting National Manager, System Policy
	Vanessa Browne, National Manager, Strategy
